title: Russian Federation
wikitext:
'''Russian Federation''', also known as '''Russia''', is one of the principal World powers in the post-[[Second Impact]] world. It is home to one of the members of the Human Instrumentality Committee, along with one of the Magi systems.

In [[Rebuild of Evangelion]], they hold joint ownership with European Union over [[Bethany Base]] and [[Evangelion Unit-05]].

The NGE Nerv White Paper RPG has an original character who hails from the Russian branch of Nerv.

{{stub}}

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Places]]

This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

In Rebuild of Evangelion, they hold joint ownership with European Union over Bethany Base and Evangelion Unit-05.
